title: platostoma hispidum
intro: Platostoma hispidum, also known as African Blue Basil or Bush Basil, is a perennial herb native to tropical Africa, belonging to the Lamiaceae family. Its medicinal properties have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, due to its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory compounds. The health benefits of Platostoma hispidum include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of the plant are typically used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can also be used as a natural remedy for anxiety and stress relief.
